gates.rationale: P94/P95/P96 all stable — HIGH_FIP hit_rate=0.641115, monthly MONTHLY_ALL_STABLE, rolling STABLE.
Only HIGH_FIP has diagnostic tracking. MID_FIP and LOW_FIP confirmed watch-only. No promotion.
schedule_coverage_pct=34.0741% (threshold: PASS>=80, WARN>=60, FAIL<60). Current 34.07% — only March–May 2026 observed. At minimum 60% required before product consideration.
observed_months=3 (threshold: PASS>=6, WARN>=4, FAIL<4). Current: only 3 months (Mar/Apr/May 2026). Minimum 4 months needed before product consideration.
No OOS calibration diagnostics exist for HIGH_FIP segment. Probability reliability is unknown. No calibration refit will be run in P97.
No real legal odds dataset available and validated through P81/P82 policy gate. Any market edge claim requires legal odds data first.
No EV/CLV validation exists from legal odds data. Market edge cannot be claimed without verified legal odds. No EV/CLV computed in P97.
No stake/risk caps or fail-safe policy defined and approved. Kelly criterion not computed. Risk controls must be approved before any production consideration.
No paper recommendation contract exists that can consume legal odds and provide source traceability. Prerequisite: legal odds dataset gate must PASS first.
No CEO explicit production-review authorization exists. Current CEO decision is CEO_DECISION_PARTIALLY_APPROVED for diagnostic tracking only.

step3_readiness_scoring.note: readiness_ratio is a diagnostic metric only. It does not trigger any promotion. All product/market gates fail due to coverage/calibration/odds/risk/governance blockers.

DATA_COVERAGE_BLOCKER.name: DATA_COVERAGE_BLOCKER
DATA_COVERAGE_BLOCKER.description: Schedule coverage at 34.07% (828/2430 games), only March–May 2026. Minimum threshold: 60% (coverage_gate PASS), 4+ months (season_span_gate). Blocking: coverage_gate, season_span_gate.
DATA_COVERAGE_BLOCKER.resolution: Continue accumulating 2026 game results. Rerun P96 when coverage reaches >=60% and >=4 months are observed.

CALIBRATION_BLOCKER.name: CALIBRATION_BLOCKER
CALIBRATION_BLOCKER.description: HIGH_FIP probability reliability not OOS-calibrated. No calibration diagnostic exists. No refit will be run until this is explicitly commissioned.
CALIBRATION_BLOCKER.resolution: Design and run an OOS calibration diagnostic for HIGH_FIP segment only. No refit, no production mutation.

LEGAL_ODDS_BLOCKER.name: LEGAL_ODDS_BLOCKER
LEGAL_ODDS_BLOCKER.description: No real legal odds dataset available and validated through P81/P82 policy. No market edge claim possible without legal odds.
LEGAL_ODDS_BLOCKER.resolution: Acquire legal odds dataset, validate through P81/P82 pipeline before any EV/CLV work.

MARKET_EDGE_BLOCKER.name: MARKET_EDGE_BLOCKER
MARKET_EDGE_BLOCKER.description: No EV/CLV validation. Market edge cannot be claimed from hit_rate alone without odds context.
MARKET_EDGE_BLOCKER.resolution: Complete LEGAL_ODDS_BLOCKER first. Then design EV/CLV validation pipeline (separate phase).

RISK_CONTROL_BLOCKER.name: RISK_CONTROL_BLOCKER
RISK_CONTROL_BLOCKER.description: No stake/risk caps or fail-safe policy defined. Kelly criterion not computed. No risk controls approved.
RISK_CONTROL_BLOCKER.resolution: Design and approve a risk control framework before any product consideration.

PRODUCT_GOVERNANCE_BLOCKER.name: PRODUCT_GOVERNANCE_BLOCKER
PRODUCT_GOVERNANCE_BLOCKER.description: No paper recommendation contract and no CEO production-review authorization. Current CEO approval covers diagnostic tracking only.
PRODUCT_GOVERNANCE_BLOCKER.resolution: Explicit CEO authorization required for production review. Cannot self-authorize.

allowed_next_actions.description: Let the 2026 season proceed. Re-run P96 and P97 when schedule_coverage_pct reaches >=60% or >=4 months are observed.

Continue HIGH_FIP diagnostic shadow tracking per P95 contract. Do not promote.
MID_FIP and LOW_FIP remain watch-only. No promotion, no action.
